import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b <= 32
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let xs = parse_ints(line1)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
    when Some(t)
      match find_index(xs, t)
      when Some(i)
        print("index=#{i}")
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
